name: Example GitHub
description: Example MCP server requiring a personal access token. The marketplace never distributes credentials — installers replace the placeholder with their own.

name: Example Weather
description: Example MCP server exposing current conditions and forecasts. Replace this entry with a real server, or delete it.

name: Excalidraw MCP Server
description: An MCP server for creating and editing Excalidraw whiteboard diagrams — add shapes and elements, render views, and save or load drawing checkpoints.

name: Selenography Lunar Features Server
description: This server hosts a database of over 9000 geologic features of the moon

name: Solar System API Server
description: Explore solar system data — search, filter, and analyze celestial bodies including planets, moons, asteroids, and comets, and calculate real-time positions of objects from any observer location.
